title: The Neanderthal DNA Puzzle No One Can Explain - David Reich
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews David Reich about Neanderthal DNA present in modern humans and outstanding questions about inheritance and admixture patterns. The discussion centers on puzzles in ancient DNA that remain unresolved by current scientific understanding.
